name: claude-skills
description: snkrheadz が運用保守する Claude Code スキルのマーケットプレイス。新メンバーが役割別に初日から同じ環境を組めるようにする。

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Cross-role foundation for everyone: first-principles thinking, teaching/onboarding, rich HTML output, a Claude Code self-guide, and a sensitive-file guard hook. Install this first, whatever your role.

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: PM / business assets maintained by snkrheadz: the 業務定義シート (task definition sheet) as A4 HTML. Pairs with the external phuryn/pm-skills marketplace for the full PM lifecycle.

plugins.name: eng
plugins.description: Engineering workflow pack: commit/PR/review/merge, test-and-fix, refactor & simplify, techdebt, dataflow tracing, DB queries, project setup, plus code-architect/reviewer, verify, build, migration and cloud-advisor agents.

plugins.name: marketer
plugins.description: Marketing pack: strategic-research-analyst agent for market/competitive/strategy research. Pairs with document-skills (brand-guidelines, internal-comms) and the deep-research skill.

plugins.name: designer
plugins.description: Design pack: nano-banana-pro-prompt-generator agent for image/visual prompts and slide storytelling. Pairs with frontend-design and document-skills (canvas-design, theme-factory, algorithmic-art).

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research pack: arxiv-ai-researcher, gemini-api-researcher and huggingface-spaces-researcher agents for AI/ML paper, API and model discovery. Role-agnostic; pairs with the marketer pack's strategic-research-analyst.
